title: New Default+ mods addon
description: Unofficial addon for mods which slightly improves texture consistency.
body:
Want to play with the New Default+ resource pack and mods? Then this addon is for you! It slightly improves the consistency of textures, such as planks and ore blocks.
List of supported mods:

Aether, Aether Redux, Deep Aether

Abnormals team mods: Atmospheric, Autumnity, Caverns and Chasms, Environmental, Upgrade Aquatic, Endergetic

Betterx mods: BetterEnd, BetterNether, Eden Ring, 

Blue Skies

Create

Deeper and Darker

Ecologics

Nature's Spirit

Paradise Lost

End's Phantasm

Regions Unexplored

Thermal Foundation

Wilder Wild

[Original New Default+ resource pack by SeaOfPixels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/newdefaultplus)
